name: LLM API Gateway – Cloud Infrastructure & Automation Platform
desc: Python-based, API-first LLM gateway to standardize request routing, validation, retries, and responses with cloud-ready principles.
features: API-first LLM gateway for standardized request routing and validation
Cloud-ready design with scalability, fault tolerance, and structured logging
CI/CD pipelines for repeatable deployments and automated configuration updates

name: Immunization Reimagined: Biological to Digital Ecosystem
desc: Systems-based literature review examining how digital platforms, data pipelines, and AI/ML models transform immunization programs into adaptive, intelligent systems.
features: Conceptual architectures integrating electronic registries and predictive analytics
AI/ML models including logistic regression, Random Forest, and SHAP for risk prediction
Governance, scalability, and ethics-by-design considerations for large-scale digital systems

name: InternPath AI – AI Powered Internship Application Copilot
desc: AI agents using IBM Watsonx Orchestrate and Granite LLM to analyze job descriptions, match skills, and generate ATS-optimized resumes and cover letters.
features: IBM Watsonx Orchestrate and Granite LLM for job description analysis and skill matching
Automated STAR-based bullet rewriting with ATS scoring and CPT/OPT-compliant language
Reduced manual application effort and improved application quality

name: Detection of Alzheimer's Disease using Machine Learning
desc: Enhanced Python-based ML pipelines to analyze MRI datasets and improve classification accuracy for Alzheimer's disease stages.
features: Python-based ML pipelines for MRI dataset analysis
Data preprocessing, feature extraction, and model evaluation
Improved detection precision and reliability for Alzheimer's classification

name: Stock Verification Management System
desc: Backend workflows to collect and process real-time inventory data, maintaining data accuracy using MySQL and SQL-based operations.
features: Backend workflows for real-time inventory data collection and processing
Data accuracy maintenance using MySQL and SQL-based operations
Improved inventory tracking and reporting through structured data modeling
